description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the java:8 Docker image and define a JBAKE_VERSION variable set to 2.5.1. In the global before_script install unzip and zip via apt‑get, download and configure SDKMAN, then install and activate jbake $JBAKE_VERSION. Add a pages job that runs in the deploy stage, executes the command `jbake . public` to generate the site, and publishes the public/ directory as a Pages artifact. No additional services, caches, or rules are needed.
